description: bioRxiv is a preprint server for biology, and its related API provides metadata and publication information for bioRxiv and medRxiv content. The public API documentation describes endpoints for manuscript details, published article mappings, and report-style metadata retrieval.
summary: biorxiv.org exposes one public HTTP API at https://api.biorxiv.org for bioRxiv/medRxiv metadata and publication reports; no GraphQL, MCP server, CLI, or developer-issued credentials were found.
